arts.ttl: Watford stun Tottenham to reach FA Youth Cup quarter-finals
arts.sum: The Hornets were very worthy winners against a Spurs side that ended with nine men, and now host Southampton in the quarter-finals.
Tom Hill previews all 12 games in the Championship this weekend and has a score prediction for each clash.

arts.ttl: ‘Deserved it’ – Sheffield United man hailed by reporter after Middlesbrough win
arts.sum: Sheffield United midfielder Sydie Peck ‘deserved’ his standing ovation against Middlesbrough on Wednesday night, BBC reporter Adam Cottier… The post ‘Deserved it’ – Sheffield United man hailed by reporter after Middlesbrough win appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Riley McGree, Anfernee Dijksteel, Alex Bangura - Middlesbrough injury update ahead of Watford - Teesside Live
arts.sum: Anfernee Dijksteel is in contention to return to the Middlesbrough squad for the game against Watford this weekend, which Michael Carrick says can be a boost for the team after a really positive campaign to date. Despite struggling for game-time for the past two seasons since Carrick’s arrival and therefore looking likely to leave last summer as he entered the final year of his contract, the Suriname international has enjoyed a renaissance at Boro this season, capitalising on many early-season defensive injuries.
